name: TON Trading Bot
description: Autonomous TON trading agent with 9-step trading pipeline (fetch → analyze → execute → record)

tools.name: ton_fetch_data
tools.description: Fetch market data: TON price, tokens, DEX liquidity, volume

tools.name: ton_validate_risk
tools.description: Validate risk: balance, max trade %, risk level

tools.name: ton_generate_plan
tools.description: Generate trade plan: entry, exit, stop-loss, position size

tools.name: ton_simulate_trade
tools.description: Simulate trade with results (no real money)

tools.name: ton_execute_trade
tools.description: Execute real trade on TON DEX (DeDust/STON.fi)

tools.name: ton_record_result
tools.description: Record trade result (sell) and update PnL

tools.name: ton_update_analytics
tools.description: Update portfolio analytics: PnL, win rate, metrics

tools.name: ton_get_portfolio
tools.description: Get portfolio overview with holdings and recent trades
